framework.name: Agent-Specific Payment Token Architecture
framework.description: Visa's approach uses specialized payment tokens provisioned specifically for AI agents, distinct from standard user payment tokens. These tokens are managed through lifecycle APIs and tied to agent identities, enabling agent-authorized transactions while maintaining user control through authenticated payment instructions.
framework.raw_quote: A new pass-through payment token, specific to agents, that is intended for use at Visa-accepting merchant locations.
